summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Villa Paris Gestionale app. All requested features working correctly: Dashboard KPIs, Clienti CRUD with secondo contatto, Calendar year picker/tooltip/double-click, Report page with Excel download.
seed_data_creation: Created test clients with TEST_ prefix for API testing, auto-cleaned after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) Dashboard loads with KPIs, Prossimo Evento, Eventi Recenti, Appuntamenti 2) Clienti page shows clients with secondo contatto info, CRUD working with all new fields 3) Calendar has year picker 2024-2030, 'Vai a data' input, hover tooltip shows event details, double-click navigates to edit page 4) Report Azienda has KPIs, 4 charts, data table, Excel download works correctly (.xlsx) 5) No React duplicate key warnings in console. Database: SQLite at prisma/dev.db. Next.js 15 app on port 3000.

dashboard.details: KPIs (Eventi mese, Ospiti, Ricavi, Clienti), Prossimo Evento section, Eventi Recenti list, Appuntamenti Clienti section all displaying correctly

clienti_page.details: Client list displays correctly with contact info, tipo, canale, secondo contatto. 9 clients shown with proper cards.

clienti_form.details: Nuovo Cliente modal has all fields including secondo contatto section (nome, telefono, email) and 6 canale contatto quick buttons (Telefono, Mail, Matrimonio.com, Social, Passaparola, Altro)

clienti_crud.details: Create client with secondo contatto saves correctly (verified via API). Edit client loads all fields including secondo contatto.

report_azienda.details: Stats displayed (Eventi Totali, Ospiti, Ricavi, Ticket Medio), 4 charts rendered (Ricavi/Eventi/Ospiti per Mese, Eventi per Tipo), data table shows monthly breakdown

excel_download.details: Scarica Excel button triggers download, file is VillaParis_Report_YYYY-MM-DD.xlsx format, valid .xlsx content

calendario_year_picker.details: Year buttons 2024-2030 visible and functional, clicking navigates calendar to selected year

calendario_vai_a_data.details: 'Vai a data' date input present and working, navigates calendar to selected date

calendario_events.details: Events displayed on calendar with correct colors (tested with TEST_Matrimonio_Verdi on June 15, 2026)

calendario_tooltip.details: Hover tooltip shows: event name, Tipo, Data, Ospiti, Referente, Tel, Stato, and 'Doppio click per aprire scheda completa'

calendario_double_click.details: Double-clicking event navigates to /modifica-evento/{id} page successfully

react_duplicate_key.details: No React duplicate key warnings in console across Dashboard, Calendario, Report, Clienti pages

console_errors.details: No console errors detected during testing
